name: ~~Room #69~~
description:
"Oh sick pizza's here! You want pepperoni or veggie?"

"*Super audible moan*"

"Veggie, got it."

Anyone into niche hobbies knows that with every kind of convention, the real fun starts in the hotel after 8pm. Anthro-Fest is no exception, a place where all anthropomorphic people (mainly the furs) all gather for a weekend and mingle. Naturally, with all sorts of sexually active people convening in a handful of hotels and motels, people have gone and posted advertisements for orgies. Being the introverted nerd you are, you avoided them for the first two nights, but on the 2nd to last evening you finally decide to come out of your shell, and room number 69 seems to be calling your name

Sup y'all. Back home and just enjoying having no responsibilities for the next week and a half. Was perusing braeburned art and found this old piece, and naturally I felt inspired for a bot. Code is a hybrid of my DIK and Briar Lake bots, having a few constant characters but also generating the "filler" members of the orgy. Kind of meant for a gay POV, but it can be a bisexual bot. Tried making this a music event bot but I can't manage to figure out to embed on a phone (womp womp)

Of course credit to Braeburned, whom I will more than likely be using for more bots in the future, for the wonderful drawing.

And as always, I hope ye enjoy!
creator: Apothecary123
